message:
Fix autocomplete_input partial keyword with trailing whitespace

When a partial keyword like "tru" had trailing whitespace (e.g.,
'{"a": tru '), the suffix "e" was appended at write_pos=len (after
the space), producing '{"a": tru e}' — invalid JSON because the
space breaks the keyword token. Now sets write_pos=atom_end so the
suffix is written immediately after the atom, producing '{"a": true}'.
